summary: Completed iteration 4 testing of Tebbi Medical System - Super Admin Dashboard and Public Booking features. Fixed 2 critical bugs (staff.map and availableSlots.map errors). All 14 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend features working correctly after fixes.

fixed_this_iteration.issue: TypeError: staff.map is not a function - API returns {staff: [...]} but code expected array directly
TypeError: availableSlots.map is not a function - API returns {available_slots: [...]} but code expected array directly

passed_tests: Backend: Super Admin login with superadmin@tebbi.com/super123
Backend: Doctor correctly denied access to admin dashboard (403)
Backend: Doctor correctly denied access to companies list (403)
Backend: Get admin dashboard stats (companies, users, patients, bookings)
Backend: Get companies list with stats
Backend: Create new company with admin user
Backend: Get company staff list
Backend: Toggle company active status
Backend: Get public doctors list (no auth required)
Backend: Get doctor available slots for specific date
Backend: Complete booking flow - select doctor, date, time, submit
Backend: Booking validation rejects incomplete data (422)
Backend: Filter doctors by specialty works
Backend: Add staff member to company
Frontend: Login page shows demo credentials for Super Admin
Frontend: Super Admin Dashboard shows stats cards (3 companies, 8 doctors, 10 patients, bookings)
Frontend: Companies list displayed with code, specialty, subscription status
Frontend: Add Company dialog opens with all form fields
Frontend: View Staff dialog shows staff members (after fix)
Frontend: Public Booking page shows doctors with specialty filter
Frontend: Booking flow - select doctor, date shows time slots (after fix)
Frontend: Booking flow - fill patient info and submit works
Frontend: Booking confirmation with code displayed
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend API response handling should always check for wrapped responses ({key: data}) pattern consistently
seed_data_creation: Test companies, staff, and bookings created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Super Admin Dashboard and Public Booking Page features are fully working. Fixed 2 bugs related to API response format handling ({staff: [...]}, {available_slots: [...]}). All CRUD operations tested. Booking confirmation codes are generated correctly. Stats cards show correct counts.

staff_map_error.symptom: TypeError: staff.map is not a function in StaffDialog component
staff_map_error.root_cause: GET /api/companies/{id}/staff returns {staff: [...]} but fetchStaff() was calling setStaff(res.data) expecting array directly
staff_map_error.fix_applied: Changed to: const staffList = res.data.staff || res.data || []; setStaff(Array.isArray(staffList) ? staffList : [])

available_slots_map_error.symptom: TypeError: availableSlots.map is not a function in PublicBookingPage
available_slots_map_error.root_cause: GET /api/public/doctors/{id}/slots returns {available_slots: [...], booked_slots: [...]} but fetchAvailableSlots() was setting res.data directly
available_slots_map_error.fix_applied: Changed to: const slots = res.data.available_slots || res.data || []; setAvailableSlots(Array.isArray(slots) ? slots : [])
